log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:9+3=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Hadozee — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:17+6=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Hadozee — Winged Striker HP: 56/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:1+3=4 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Hadozee — Winged Striker --- HP: 56/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 3 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
